The primary driver of cash inflows in both periods was net earnings. Cash flows in both periods were affected positively by an increase in customer deposits driven by Gulfstream aircraft orders and a decrease in unbilled receivables due to the receipt of progress payments on large international vehicle contracts in our Combat Systems segment.
